cases.situation: I am considering buying an Abuja plot and want the documents checked before sending a deposit.

findings.summary: Documents were reviewed. Seller authority evidence is incomplete and registry confirmation is still required before payment.
findings.red_flags: No AGIS/FCTA search result attached. Seller authority needs stronger evidence.
findings.missing_items: Registry search result, seller ID/company authority, updated survey confirmation.
findings.recommendation: Pause until missing evidence is provided and verified.

reports.property_summary: Land purchase enquiry for a plot in Gwarinpa from Sample Homes Ltd at ₦45m.
reports.checks_completed: Initial lawyer document review completed. Registry and seller authority evidence remain outstanding.
reports.findings_summary: Documents reviewed show enough concern to pause before deposit. AGIS/FCTA search result has not been supplied.
reports.red_flags: Missing registry confirmation and incomplete seller authority evidence.
reports.missing_evidence: AGIS/FCTA search result, seller authority documents, updated survey confirmation.
reports.next_steps: Do not release deposit. Request missing evidence and complete registry search first.
